question_template: Which marked object or region can the agent use to leave the room?

placeholders.goal_text: object A is on the table

answer_rule: Select marked door/exit/doorway connected to another navigable region.
quality_checks: ground truth must be generated from simulator state / geometry / navigation / rendering, not from LLM
avoid boundary cases where two options are nearly tied
notes: Reference template only. Adapt field names to your generator.
